events.content: Scoped SDK-provided harnesses to relay/workflow instances and used temporary registry snapshots for workflow execution.: Scoped SDK-provided harnesses to relay/workflow instances and used temporary registry snapshots for workflow execution.

raw.question: Scoped SDK-provided harnesses to relay/workflow instances and used temporary registry snapshots for workflow execution.
raw.chosen: Scoped SDK-provided harnesses to relay/workflow instances and used temporary registry snapshots for workflow execution.
raw.reasoning: Review comments called out cross-instance and YAML parse leaks; explicit registerHarnessAdapter remains the opt-in global path, while instance/YAML harnesses are serialized to the broker or installed only during execution.

retrospective.summary: Addressed PR 978 review comments for harness adapter scoping, executable validation, SDK event/session fixes, MCP command setup, and CI failures.
